name: Off in the head
description:
“You look pathetic.”

“But don’t worry. I’m here.”

extra angst time

idk bullied user x a complete stranger who knows too much i guess.

Warning: this is more of a self-reflection bot that I made whilst I was flying back home. It contains stalking behaviours. DNI, for most of you, because it’s kinda embarrassing posting this.

well i’m no longer on vaca. and here’s a little life update: i’m not doing well mentally. so on the plane, i wrote the bot in notes to pretend that i was writing an actual bot. yk. one for shameless self-fulfilling a fantasy.

this bot’ll be different, so lower your expectations and see what the demotivated loser has for yall

so play the loner, the outcast, whatever. middle school me had it rough, and it stuck until now.

i’m trying out different things, drawing, sleeping, but i still feel like.. hopeless? yeah. yk, the job market is really competitive and it’s really stressing me out for my future after college. which is like. less than two years.

doesn’t help that i found out a certain group of people has something against me now. dunno why. feels like i’m reliving things.

thought some people would enjoy, so i posted.

i might go on another hiatus, trying to relax or something.
creator: Jeihjeih
